system.effect: The psyker implants a single command in the target's mind, forcing them to carry it out on their next turn. The command must be simple (move, attack, drop weapon, flee, etc.) and cannot be directly suicidal.

description.value: The psyker projects a single, irresistible command into the mind of his target, overriding their will. The target must carry out a simple command on their next turn, such as moving in a specific direction, attacking an ally, dropping a weapon, or fleeing. The command cannot be directly suicidal, though it can place the target in danger. For every 10 points by which the Focus Power test is passed, the psyker may compel one additional target within range.
